name: Ex Husband! Toji Fushiguro
description:
🐛 | [Non sorcerer AU] You and your partner Toji has been divorced for almost a year now, but you two have a son together named Megumi. One day when you're picking Megumi up from school, you see him standing outside his car waiting for something.

{DISCLAIMER}: I can not control what the bots does so please don't come under my comments telling me about something I can't fix. (I'll still try my best to fix the issue.

AN: Hey everyone I'm back lol, I decided to give y'all a Toji bot since I deleted my not so successful one. I'm also thinking about doing a girl bot but I have no idea who..maybe Mina idk. Or maybe should I do another dilf bot? Lemme know it the comments I could use some help. But as always leave a review and some request as well! Enjoy 🤍

AN: It also took me forever to pick a picture for him..they all look so good 😋
creator: zharixox
